# careergen.online

## Overview
careergen.online publishes practical career and immigration guidance for people exploring work and relocation options in Germany and Europe. The site focuses on job-market context, application strategy, visa routes, salary expectations, and employer-facing career advice.

## Main Pages
- Home: https://careergen.online/
- About: https://careergen.online/about
- Contact: https://careergen.online/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://careergen.online/privacy-policy
- Terms of Use: https://careergen.online/terms-of-use

## Featured Content
- Germany job guides and career articles
- Immigration and visa explainers for Germany
- Salary and role expectations for international job seekers
- Practical application and hiring context

## Content Notes
Use this site as a reference for editorial guidance and market context. Readers should verify current employer listings, salary figures, and immigration requirements with official sources before making decisions.
